effect.name: Crossover Distortion
effect.description:
Crossover Distortion (LADSPA 1404)
This is a simulation of the distortion that happens in class B and AB power amps when the signal crosses 0.
effect.author: Steve Harris (http://www.ladspa.org)

parameter.name: Crossover Amplitude
parameter.comment: Controls the point at which the output signal becomes linear

parameter.name: Smoothing
parameter.comment: Controls degree of smoothing of the crossover point
